_comment_phase1: Phase 1 uses rank-product method (Breitling et al. 2004) across 4 evidence layers: selection (MEME p-value), convergence (PhyloP), convergent AAs, expression (Bgee). Tiers assigned by FDR-corrected rank-product p-value.
_comment_phase1_tiers: Tier1: FDR < 0.05, Tier2: FDR < 0.20, Tier3: rest. Expression weight is small (0.10) to add tissue-specificity without overriding evolution signal.

rank_product._comment: Phase 1 rank-product FDR thresholds for tier assignment
